title: Claude Code 推出 Artifacts 交互页面
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Claude Code users on Team and Enterprise plans gained access to Artifacts, new interactive pages that can be built based on their Claude Code sessions.
Every session is an Artifact now 👀
00:00
Claude
@claudeai
13h
Replying to @claudeai Artifacts draw on the full context of your session: codebase, plugins, skills, connected tools. They're private until you share them, and sharing stays inside your organization.
Read more: claude.com/blog/artifacts…
8:30 PM · Jun 18, 2026 25K Views
